case_title: AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES & INTERIORS VS. MENDELSOHN HOUSE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES & INTERIORS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MENDELSOHN HOUSE PLAINTIFF DID NOT REBUT DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY THAT THE SALESPERSON WARRANTED TO MATCH THE EXISTING CHAIRS. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO DELIVER MATCHING CHAIRS IS A BREACH OF WARRANTY. SEE CAL.COM.CODE 2313(1)(B),(C) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,990.63 FILED BY AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES & INTERIORS AS TO DEFENDANT MENDELSOHN HOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES & INTERIORS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES & INTERIORS AS TO DEFENDANT MENDELSOHN HOUSE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES & INTERIORS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDELSOHN HOUSE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-29-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDELSOHN HOUSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT AAA BUSINESS SUPPLY AND INTERIORS, REPRESENTED BY JON LAPINE, CONTROLLER. DEFENDANT MENDELSOHN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WILLIE ABASTA. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
